event.name: DESTROYED_OG_BATTLECRUISER_SLUG
event.text: While scrapping the wreckage of the Battlecruiser, you find a functional Turret drifting in the midst of the wreckage.

event.name: DEAD_CREW_OG_BATTLECRUISER_SLUG
event.text: The Battlecruiser has been emptied of crew. While scrapping it, you find a Turret in its storage.

event.name: NEBULA_OG_BATTLECRUISER_SLUG

beaconType.visitedTooltip: Explored location. Nothing left of interest.

event.text: A Battlecruiser wielding powerful Turret tech is sitting at this beacon. The Kleptocracy aren't known as honest merchants, so you doubt this particular slug got his hands on those turrets fairly.

choice.text: Attack, we can steal their Turret tech!

event.text: You've taken the risky choice of fighting the ship. Hopefully, you can protect yourself from their salvo long enough.
Messing with a Battlecruiser is a bad idea.

event.name: DESTROYED_OG_BATTLECRUISER_CLAN
event.text: While scrapping the wreckage of the Battlecruiser, you find a functional Turret drifting in the midst of the wreckage.

event.name: DEAD_CREW_OG_BATTLECRUISER_CLAN
event.text: The Battlecruiser has been emptied of crew. While scrapping it, you find a Turret in its storage.

event.name: NEBULA_OG_BATTLECRUISER_CLAN

beaconType.visitedTooltip: Explored location. Nothing left of interest.

event.text: A Battlecruiser wielding powerful Turret tech is sitting at this beacon. The Kleptocracy aren't known as honest merchants, so you doubt this particular CLAN got his hands on those turrets fairly.

choice.text: Attack, we can steal their Turret tech!

event.text: You've taken the risky choice of fighting the ship. Hopefully, you can protect yourself from their salvo long enough.
Messing with a Battlecruiser is a bad idea.

event.name: DESTROYED_OG_BATTLECRUISER_CRYSTAL
event.text: While scrapping the wreckage of the Battlecruiser, you find a functional Turret drifting in the midst of the wreckage.

event.name: DEAD_CREW_OG_BATTLECRUISER_CRYSTAL
event.text: The Battlecruiser has been emptied of crew. While scrapping it, you find a Turret in its storage.

event.name: OG_BATTLECRUISER_CRYSTAL

beaconType.visitedTooltip: Explored location. Nothing left of interest.

event.text: The Crystalline Empire is more territorial than any other government or species. A Battlecruiser, wielding specialized Turret tech, is patrolling the beacon, but for once they don't seem to care about your presence.

choice.text: Attack, we can steal their Turret tech!

event.text: You've taken the risky choice of fighting the ship. Hopefully, you can protect yourself from their salvo long enough.
Messing with a Battlecruiser is a bad idea.
